title: rubus spina-curva
intro: Rubus spina-curva, a member of the rose family, is a thorny shrub native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is also known as the curved thorn or curved bramble. The medicinal properties of Rubus spina-curva include its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption.
